features: Just a friendly heads-up:Includes 5PCS storage containers.For the perfect fit, we recommend double-checking the dimensions (5.3" L x 3.9" W x 1.9" H),total capacity: Plastic: 500ml (16.9 oz) before ordering—that way you get exactly what you need!

BPA-Free & Food-Grade Material:Made with high-quality, non-toxic plastic to ensure the safety of your food, our portion box sets keep your meals fresh and secure.Leakproof Lids:Designed with airtight seals,these lids prevent spills and lock in freshness,making them perfect for on-the-go meals and meal prep.

Stackable & Space-Saving:Our rectangle storage containers are designed to fit together seamlessly,maximizing kitchen,fridge,and pantry space.Versatile Usage:Ideal for storing a variety of foods, including cereal,fruits,vegetables,leftovers,and more.Perfect for work,school,travel,and daily meal prep.

Microwave & Fridge Safe:Effortlessly reheat or cool your meals,as our containers are safe to use in the microwave and refrigerator. Easy Cleaning:Our food storage containers are dishwasher safe for quick and hassle-free cleaning.

Reusable:Made to last,these containers are perfect for daily use,reducing waste from disposable alternatives. These containers help you manage your food intake for a healthier lifestyle. Transparent Design:See-through containers make it easy to identify the contents, keeping your kitchen organized and clutter-free.
